overall.description: First-person exploration of a dark, neon-lit cyberpunk apartment from a video game. The player moves slowly through a high-tech living space filled with glowing cyan server racks and holographic displays, approaching a large window overlooking a cityscape at night.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment server room with glowing cyan racks

agents.ego_description: slowly walking through the dark apartment, observing the high-tech equipment and neon-lit server racks

entered.detail: tall black server cabinets with glowing cyan LED strips and holographic interfaces
multiple floating cyan holographic screens displaying data and system interfaces on the far wall
modern ergonomic office chair with orange-brown upholstery positioned near the desk
long dark desk surface with equipment underneath the holographic displays
recessed ceiling with geometric panel design and ambient lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view moving through a dimly lit, futuristic apartment dominated by cyan neon lighting. Server racks with glowing interfaces line the right side while holographic displays illuminate the far wall. The space is empty of people, creating a solitary, high-tech atmosphere as the camera advances toward the desk area.

scene_state.functional_zone: desk area with panoramic city view

events.description: large window revealing nighttime cityscape and distant buildings comes into view on the left

agents.ego_description: approaching the desk and turning slightly toward the large window to observe the city view outside

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling panoramic window revealing a dark nighttime cityscape with distant illuminated buildings

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves closer to the desk, a large panoramic window enters the frame on the left, revealing a dark cityscape outside. The server racks move out of view as the perspective shifts toward the window, while the holographic displays continue to glow cyan against the night. The scene transitions from an enclosed tech-focused interior to one connected with the urban environment outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dimly lit, high-tech apartment that gradually opens up to reveal a sprawling nocturnal cityscape. It begins by advancing through a solitary interior dominated by cyan neon lighting, passing server racks with glowing interfaces and holographic displays that illuminate the far wall. As the camera approaches the desk area, the perspective shifts and the server racks move out of view to make room for a large panoramic window entering the frame on the left. The scene then transitions from the enclosed, tech-focused atmosphere of the room to a wider connection with the urban environment outside, where the cyan glow of the holograms contrasts with the dark city skyline.
